column1: Quantumplation: didn't realize i had to click submit move
C[Quantumplation: didn't realize i had to click submit move
C[jenisis: I'm starting to get this game.
Quantumplation: yea, just doing other stuff
C[jenisis: I feel I'm doing poorly.
jenisis: I was supposed to go to bed 48 minutes ago.
Quantumplation: lol so go to bed, we'll finish this tomorrow
jenisis: I think your bottom right is in trouble.
Quantumplation: you're doing ok, i've been kind of reckless
C[Quantumplation: Oh cool, if you type coordinates like G17 they highlight on the board
jenisis: I already messed up a ton.
jenisis: I have to play perfectly to get the advantage back.
C[jenisis: Don't forget you have to submit moves.
C[Quantumplation: Yup.  I'm doing other things, so moves might take a few minutes
C[jenisis: Also, I've been practicing vs. Computer.
C[jenisis: But that's two more than zero.
C[Quantumplation: when the game is over, look in the ""Malkovich Log"", i'll be commenting on your moves in that, but you can't see it until the game ends
C[Quantumplation: K14 was a good instinct to run out, but L14 might have been better, because it would have been harder to split
C[Quantumplation: Tenuki (""Playing Away"") here was wrong.  That allowed me to contain your group, and it will probably die now.
jenisis: It says you have .5 Komi.
jenisis: I'm sure knowing what Komi is would answer that.
jenisis: I have to go to bed at some point.
Quantumplation: Sorry, was eating pizza with roommates
Quantumplation: ""Komi"" is additional points awarded to the white player because black got to go first.
Quantumplation: In an even game, it's 5.5 or 6.5
Quantumplation: but since you're at a handicap, it's only .5 for me
Quantumplation: the .5 is to break a tie.
C[jenisis: That seems like a big difference in a pro game.
Quantumplation: P16 makes an empty triangle, which is bad shape.
C[jenisis: The board looks like a skeleton reindeer shrouded in darkness.
C[jenisis: Almost put that at P8
jenisis: What a mistake that'd have been.
jenisis: How did I not see that whole areas earlier?
jenisis: I know how much you love quotes.
C[Quantumplation: M3 is a cool move
C[jenisis: I figured you couldn't connect, and if you tried to surround, I could attach to another body.
C[jenisis: I was doing so well, and you went and did that.
C[jenisis: Is that an invincible body?
C[jenisis: Also, how am I doing?
C[jenisis: You know, because it's not like I have a 9 turn advantage or anything.
C[Quantumplation: lol still, you've been playing a week or two
C[jenisis: I beat my friend Riley two days before school ended.
C[jenisis: Much different without the 9 to start.
jenisis: But in the beginning, I put 3-4 pieces in those spots, or close.
C[jenisis: Late game is really hard.
jenisis: I do better early on.

Quantumplation: ""racing"", though that's a shitty term for it

C[Quantumplation: You're starting to get very hasty here
C[jenisis: Why didn't I see that.
C[jenisis: I have a hard time making un-takable bodies.

C[Quantumplation: i'll buy you a book of life-and-death problems

jenisis: You won by a lot, yet again.

jenisis: Yeah, made some silly mistakes.

jenisis: That's what I get for not multitasking with something else.
